creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/#mfc-glossary> does not exist (presents the front page of the (split) Handbook, from where scrolling down to the glossary is partially broken). 

Instead: 

* <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/glossary/#mfc-glossary>

----

I guess, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/06cf1fe34b06ca22330679ed74dcb74a7ecb31dc#diff-30c51538e2091a060532c421ac08d9f7cbc7374104425c8278caad78c805a697R19-R21> and <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/d000d2df99217bceaee581709d9efa1f1014bcb9#diff-30c51538e2091a060532c421ac08d9f7cbc7374104425c8278caad78c805a697R19-R21> were from an outdated template.
